mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate discount rates and borrowing costs, directly compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50 percent of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rates exceeding 6.5 percent indicate substantial labor market slack that suppresses wage inflation, prompting accommodative monetary policy that supports equity valuations over a quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 55 percent of triggered months over a 5-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth and positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST yield negative forward returns in more than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month contractions in industrial production indicate supply-side bottlenecks that compress profit margins, triggering short-term equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 5-day returns in more than 70 percent of contraction episodes.

mechanism_narrative: CPIAUCSL readings above 2.5 percent trigger expectations of monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and driving negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur in more than 50 percent of high-inflation observations over a 4-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate disposable income, boosting corporate earnings forecasts and generating positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains negative over 5-year out-of-sample periods, or positive returns occur in less than 45 percent of growth months.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly retail sales indicates weakening consumer transmission, signaling earnings downgrades and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 65 percent of divergence episodes over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in industrial production and housing starts signals a broad economic slowdown, prompting flight-to-safety flows and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55 percent of dual-contraction months over a 2-year rolling window.
